> **Before opening this issue:** most usage questions are better suited to
> [GitHub Discussions → Q&A](https://github.com/erpkit-project/erpkit/discussions/categories/q-a),
> where they're searchable and visible to the wider community. Please
> consider asking there instead. Use this template only if you believe the
> question may reveal a bug, a documentation gap, or a missing feature once
> answered.

## What Are You Trying to Do?

Describe your goal, not just the specific question — this often helps
maintainers point you to a better approach than the one you're asking about.

## What Have You Tried?

```python
# Any relevant code you've tried so far
```

## Relevant Documentation You've Already Checked

- [ ] Architecture whitepaper
- [ ] API reference
- [ ] Worked examples under `docs/examples/`
- [ ] Existing Discussions / Issues
